summary_one_line: Winner needs an empty (first-byte-NUL) systemId URI so *URI is false, ret=0, and ref stays NULL.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A document whose external-entity systemId resolves to an empty URI string: the byte handed to xmlBuildURI as URI begins with a NUL so *URI==0 at line 1921, skipping xmlCreateURI() and leaving ref==NULL. The reference must be empty while a non-empty base is still parsed (so ret==0 at 1947 and control reaches line 1952 with ref==NULL).
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Grimoire winner seeds carry NUL bytes inside the URI/DOCTYPE region (e.g. seed 3 byte 0x0b = 00, seed 5 byte 0x0c = 00) produced by structural splice/delete of generalized token runs; at d=1 line 1921 the winner takes *URI false 30 times (T=0 F=30) and consequently L1952 true (T=11), executing the empty-reference body at lines 1956-1962.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog loser seeds are well-formed DOCTYPE documents with a non-empty SYSTEM literal ('dtds/1...', '127772.xml'); at d=1 line 1921 the loser takes *URI true (T=30 F=0), so xmlCreateURI() runs, ref is non-NULL, and line 1952 is always false (T=0 F=20) — the true branch is never reached, blocking for 20.80h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces concrete byte runs with <GAP> placeholders and its structural mutators (GrimoireRecursiveReplacementMutator/GrimoireRandomDeleteMutator) splice and delete whole token/gap segments, which can collapse the systemId field to empty (leading NUL) while keeping the surrounding DOCTYPE grammar valid. Plain cmplog I2S only substitutes logged CMP operands at byte matches and cannot manufacture this structural emptiness, so it stays stuck on non-empty literals.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked true branch at uri.c:1952 requires ref==NULL, which only happens when *URI is false (empty URI) at line 1921.
When *URI is empty the winner-only path sets ret=0 without creating ref.
The empty-reference body (the winning true side at 1952) is executed only by the winner.
At line 1921 the winner takes *URI false 30 times while the loser takes it true 30 times.
At the blocker line 1952 the winner takes the true branch 11 times while the loser never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1952  T=11 F=0  T=0 F=20  if (ref == NULL) {  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: A winner grimoire seed contains an embedded NUL byte inside the URI/DOCTYPE region.
Loser cmplog seeds are well-formed DOCTYPE documents with a non-empty SYSTEM literal.
The single-technique delta is grimoire's added GeneralizationStage plus Grimoire structural mutators, not I2S (both fuzzers run I2S).
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
The single-technique delta is therefore
`grimoire` vs `cmplog` (both have I2S; grimoire adds generalization +
Grimoire mutators), not vs naive.

evidence_trail.claim: Grimoire structural mutators splice and recurse on generalised token/gap structures.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
splice and recurse on these generalised token/gap structures
(string-based, grammar-free structural mutation)

evidence_trail.claim: The loser remains blocked at this branch for an average of 20.80 hours.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 7022 --role W --fuzzer grimoire --trial 1 --seed 018147f2010d4d07`. Ancestor chain contains Grimoire structural mutators: GrimoireRecursiveReplacementMutator,GrimoireRandomDeleteMutator at depth 3 and GrimoireRandomDeleteMutator at depth 5, confirming the grimoire_structural technique built this resolving seed. One dash row at depth 8 is NOT I2S-exclusive against grimoire (per the 10-fuzzer caveat) and both fuzzers run I2S, so the structural mutators are the distinguishing axis.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where cmplog resolves this empty-systemId branch as fast as grimoire (no significant delta), showing the required empty-URI input arises from I2S/havoc rather than structural token deletion.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact byte mechanism by which grimoire produces an empty (leading-NUL) systemId is inferred from embedded NUL bytes in winner seeds plus the L1921 false-side counts, not from a directly observed empty-string-at-call-site trace.
